title: Enderman Chaos
description: Lets endermen pick up almost any block, turning the world into pure chaos.
body:
Enderman Chaos makes endermen much more dangerous and unpredictable by allowing them to pick up almost any block
  instead of only the small vanilla holdable list.

  With this mod installed, endermen can steal blocks that they normally would never touch, which makes exploration,
  building, and storage areas feel much more chaotic. Worlds stay vanilla-like in every other way: this mod does not add
  new items, new blocks, or custom dimensions. It only changes what endermen are allowed to carry.

  ## Notes

  - mob griefing must be enabled for endermen to move blocks
